description: Discussion on Solana's network performance issues and upcoming updates from the Solana Foundation. Participants include Anatoly and engineers from Solana Labs. Topics include server program expansion and data center operators like Equinix and Lumen providing validator nodes. Performance improvements in versions 1.8 and 1.9 are also discussed, with expectations for rollout timelines.
topic_summary: The meeting covers network performance concerns, server program updates, and the introduction of new data center operators to support the Solana ecosystem. Key points include the anticipated improvements in the 1.9 version and ongoing work on the 1.8 version to enhance network stability and performance. [t=38:09] [t=85:60] [t=355:70]
